---
title: "Pygo_gene_enrichment (AUTO‑WRAP, robust)"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

##############################################################################
## Transcriptomics → GO / KEGG → Reactome enrichment (Gallus gallus)        ##
## + diagnostics, Excel export, auto‑wrapped dot‑plots (robust)            ##
##############################################################################

## 0. CONFIGURATION -----------------------------------------------------------
input_file   <- "pygo_MAIN.csv"   # DE table: gene, logFC, padj
species_name <- "chicken"         # ReactomePA shorthand
kegg_code    <- "gga"             # KEGG organism code
padj_cutoff  <- 0.05              # adjusted‑P significance threshold
logFC_cutoff <- 1                 # minimum |log2FC| to keep
topN         <- 300               # keep top N up + N down genes

## 1. INSTALL & LOAD PACKAGES ------------------------------------------------
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly=TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
cran_pkgs <- c("UpSetR","EnhancedVolcano","stringr")
to_install <- cran_pkgs[!sapply(cran_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly=TRUE)]
if (length(to_install)) install.packages(to_install, dependencies=TRUE)
bio_pkgs <- c("clusterProfiler","ReactomePA","pathview","biomaRt",
             "AnnotationDbi","dplyr","ggplot2","openxlsx",
             "ComplexHeatmap","circlize","enrichplot")
bio_install <- bio_pkgs[!sapply(bio_pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly=TRUE)]
if (length(bio_install)) BiocManager::install(bio_install, ask=FALSE, update=FALSE)
if (!requireNamespace("org.Gg.eg.db", quietly=TRUE)) BiocManager::install("org.Gg.eg.db", ask=FALSE, update=FALSE)

# load libraries
library(clusterProfiler); library(ReactomePA); library(pathview)
library(biomaRt); library(AnnotationDbi); library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2); library(openxlsx); library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize); library(UpSetR); library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(enrichplot); library(stringr); library(org.Gg.eg.db)
orgDb <- org.Gg.eg.db

dir.create("output", showWarnings=FALSE)

## 2. READ & PREP DATA --------------------------------------------------------
tbl <- read.csv(input_file, check.names=FALSE) |>
       rename(gene=1, logFC=2, padj=3)
gene2entrez <- AnnotationDbi::select(orgDb,
                keys=tbl$gene, columns="ENTREZID", keytype="SYMBOL")
tbl <- left_join(tbl, gene2entrez, by=c("gene"="SYMBOL")) |>
       filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))

gene_universe <- tbl$ENTREZID
tbl_sig <- tbl |>
           filter(padj < padj_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= logFC_cutoff) |>
           arrange(desc(logFC))
if (nrow(tbl_sig) > 2*topN) {
  tbl_sig <- bind_rows(head(tbl_sig, topN), tail(tbl_sig, topN))
}
sig_genes <- unique(tbl_sig$ENTREZID)

cat(sprintf("\\nUniverse: %d genes | Test set: %d genes (%.1f%%)\\n",
    length(unique(gene_universe)), length(sig_genes),
    100*length(sig_genes)/length(unique(gene_universe))))

## 3. ENRICHMENT ANALYSES -----------------------------------------------------
ego <- enrichGO(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  OrgDb         = orgDb,
  keyType       = "ENTREZID",
  ont           = "BP",
  universe      = gene_universe,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable      = TRUE
)
ekegg <- enrichKEGG(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  universe      = gene_universe,
  organism      = kegg_code,
  keyType       = "ncbi-geneid",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
)
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg))>0)
  ekegg <- setReadable(ekegg, orgDb, keyType="ENTREZID")
ereact <- enrichPathway(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  universe      = gene_universe,
  organism      = species_name,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable      = TRUE
)

# preranked GSEA
ranks <- tbl |> arrange(desc(logFC)) |>
         transmute(ENTREZID, rnk=logFC) |> tibble::deframe()
gsea_go <- gseGO(
  geneList      = ranks,
  OrgDb         = orgDb,
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH"
)
if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go))>0)
  gsea_go <- setReadable(gsea_go, orgDb, keyType="ENTREZID")

## 4. EXPORT TABLES -----------------------------------------------------------
as_df <- function(res, id_col="geneID"){
  if (is.null(res)||nrow(as.data.frame(res))==0) return(data.frame())
  dplyr::rename(as.data.frame(res), Genes=!!id_col)
}
write.xlsx(list(
  GO_ORA   = as_df(ego), KEGG_ORA = as_df(ekegg),
  Reactome = as_df(ereact), GO_GSEA = as_df(gsea_go,"core_enrichment")),
  file="output/enrichment_results_with_genes.xlsx", overwrite=TRUE)

## 5. PLOTTING HELPERS --------------------------------------------------------
save_plot <- function(p, fname, w=7, h=5)
  ggsave(file.path("output",fname), plot=p, width=w, height=h, units="in")

make_dot <- function(res, stub, title,
                     n_cat=15, wrap_width=45,
                     text_size=9, text_angle=0,
                     w=7, h=5){
  df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (nrow(df)==0) return(invisible())
  # select top
  df <- df[seq_len(min(n_cat,nrow(df))), ]
  # wrap labels
  df$Description <- str_wrap(df$Description, width=wrap_width)
  # detect x & size
  if ("GeneRatio" %in% names(df) && "Count"%in%names(df)){
    # parse GeneRatio like "5/100" -> numeric
    df$GeneRatioNum <- sapply(strsplit(df$GeneRatio,"/"),
                              function(x) as.numeric(x[1])/as.numeric(x[2]))
    x_var <- "GeneRatioNum"; x_lab <- "Gene ratio"; size_var <- "Count"
  } else if ("NES"%in%names(df) && "setSize"%in%names(df)){
    x_var <- "NES"; x_lab <- "NES"; size_var <- "setSize"
  } else stop("Unsupported enrichment object")
  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x=x_var,
                             y=paste0("reorder(Description,",x_var,")"),
                             size=size_var,
                             colour="p.adjust")) +
       geom_point() +
       scale_colour_continuous(low="red", high="blue", name="adj-P") +
       scale_size(range=c(2,6)) +
       labs(title=title, x=x_lab, y=NULL) +
       theme_bw() +
       theme(axis.text.y=element_text(size=text_size,
                                      angle=text_angle,
                                      hjust=ifelse(text_angle==0,1,0.5)))
  save_plot(p, sprintf("dotplot_%s.pdf",stub), w, h)
}

## 5b. VOLCANO PLOT HELPER FOR ENRICHMENT RESULTS -----------------------------
make_volcano <- function(res,
                         stub,
                         title,
                         x_var = c("GeneRatio", "NES"),
                         wrap_width = 45,
                         w = 7, h = 5) {

  df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(invisible())

  # Decide which x-axis variable to use
  x_var <- match.arg(x_var)
  if (x_var == "GeneRatio") {
    # convert “5/120” → 5 / 120
    df$GeneRatioNum <- sapply(strsplit(df$GeneRatio, "/"),
                              \(x) as.numeric(x[1]) / as.numeric(x[2]))
    x_val  <- "GeneRatioNum"
    x_lab  <- "Gene ratio"
    size_var <- "Count"
  } else {                     # NES  (GSEA)
    x_val <- "NES"
    x_lab <- "Normalized enrichment score (NES)"
    size_var <- "setSize"
  }

  # Y-axis: –log10 adj-P
  df$log10Padj <- -log10(df$p.adjust)

  # Shorten long term names so they fit nicely
  df$Description <- str_wrap(df$Description, width = wrap_width)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = x_val,
                             y = "log10Padj",
                             label = "Description")) +
       geom_point(aes_string(size = size_var, colour = "log10Padj")) +
       ggrepel::geom_text_repel(max.overlaps = 20, size = 3) +
       scale_colour_gradient(low = "steelblue", high = "firebrick") +
       scale_size(range = c(2, 6)) +
       labs(title = title,
            x = x_lab,
            y = expression(-log[10]~adj*P)) +
       theme_bw()

  save_plot(p, sprintf("volcano_%s.pdf", stub), w, h)
}


## 6. VISUALISATIONS ----------------------------------------------------------
# Volcano
volc <- EnhancedVolcano(tbl, lab=tbl$gene, x="logFC", y="padj",
                        xlab=bquote(~Log[2]~" fold change"),
                        pCutoff=padj_cutoff, FCcutoff=logFC_cutoff,
                        selectLab=tbl_sig$gene)
save_plot(volc,"volcano_plot.pdf",7,6)

# logFC bins
pdf("output/logFC_bins_barplot.pdf",6,4)
barplot(table(cut(abs(tbl$logFC), c(0,1,2,4,8,Inf),
                labels=c("<1","1-2","2-4","4-8",">8"))),
        main="Distribution of |log2FC|", ylab="Gene count",
        xlab="|log2FC| bin")
dev.off()

# UpSet
if (nrow(as_df(ego))||nrow(as_df(ekegg))||nrow(as_df(ereact))){
  terms <- list()
  if(nrow(as_df(ego)))    terms$GO_BP    <- as_df(ego)$Description
  if(nrow(as_df(ekegg)))  terms$KEGG     <- as_df(ekegg)$Description
  if(nrow(as_df(ereact))) terms$Reactome <- as_df(ereact)$Description
  pdf("output/upset_enrichment_terms.pdf",7,5)
  UpSetR::upset(fromList(terms), order.by="freq",
                mainbar.y.label="Shared terms",
                sets.x.label="Term count")
  dev.off()
}

# Cnetplot
if(nrow(as_df(ego)))
  save_plot(cnetplot(ego, showCategory=10,node_label="all"),
            "cnetplot_GO_ORA.pdf",9,8)

# Dot-plots
make_dot(ego,      "GO_ORA",      "GO BP ORA")
make_dot(ekegg,    "KEGG_ORA",    "KEGG ORA")
make_dot(ereact,   "Reactome_ORA","Reactome ORA")
make_dot(gsea_go,  "GO_GSEA",     "GO GSEA (preranked)")

# === Enrichment volcano plots ===
make_volcano(ego,     "GO_ORA",  "GO BP ORA volcano",  x_var = "GeneRatio")
make_volcano(gsea_go, "GO_GSEA", "GO BP GSEA volcano", x_var = "NES")


cat("\\n✓ All done! Check 'output/' for Excel + plots.\\n")

```
